title: Transpose table

posts.author: pgharkness (Philippa)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to create a view of my Monday board in the format of a transposed table structure. This structure would be that the item name move to the columns and the columns are the new item names. I need the two tables to be connected, with the original board remaining the main table., so that any updates made in the main board are automatically reflected in the new structure.

posts.author: kylecordes (Kyle Cordes)
posts.cookedHtml: @pgharkness We have an app in development that I think will at least partially, maybe fully, do what you want. If you send me a message either here on this forum or contact support on our website, we will set up your axis so you can try it. Link: Support - Virtenia
